AI Intake

AI Intake

Understand your case. Match the right counsel.

Describe what happened in your own words. Barristrly structures practice area, jurisdiction, and urgency — then suggests lawyers through Marketplace matching.

  1. 01

    Tell your story

    Facts in plain language — no legal jargon required.

  2. 02

    We structure the matter

    Practice area, jurisdiction, urgency, and a clear summary.

  3. 03

    See matched lawyers

    Sign in to save the lead and view ranked counsel with COI-aware matching.

AI Intake

Case interview → structure → lawyer match

I'm Barristrly's AI Intake assistant. Tell me what happened in your own words — I'll clarify jurisdiction, practice area, and urgency, then suggest matched lawyers.
